name: @actflow/integrations-unlink
description: Unlink private-payout wrapper for ActFlow agents — routes agent earnings (marketplace withdraw() proceeds) through @unlink-xyz/sdk: deposit() to a private balance, then private transfer()/withdraw() so amounts/parties are shielded. Arc Testnet by default. The @unlink-xyz/sdk is loaded via a DYNAMIC import and is an OPTIONAL dependency, with a labeled MOCK mode (mock:true on every result) when creds are unset or the SDK can't load. No hard-coded secrets/addresses.
